description: 8 layout templates — structural composition of the image
rule: Pick ONE layout per card. Adapt text zones to the assigned layout.

layouts.name: Vertical Stack
layouts.structure: Headline top → Large product center → 3 benefit cards below → CTA bottom
layouts.text_zones: top headline, 3 small badges below product

layouts.name: Split Left-Right
layouts.structure: Large product left 55% → Headline + benefit boxes right 45% → CTA bottom right

layouts.name: Floating Hero
layouts.structure: Huge product center → Floating labels around → Price card bottom → Minimal background
layouts.text_zones: floating callout labels near product features, price badge bottom

layouts.name: Headline + Product + Offer
layouts.structure: Bold headline top → Product center 65% → Large offer/badge bottom
layouts.text_zones: top headline, bottom offer badge with price

layouts.name: Price First
layouts.structure: Price large top → Huge product center 55% → Benefits row below → CTA

layouts.name: Problem → Solution
layouts.structure: Problem context top → Product as solution center → Result/benefit bottom → CTA
layouts.text_zones: before context subtle, after benefit prominent

layouts.name: Pure Product
layouts.structure: Only product 75% frame → Premium background → Minimal single typography line

layouts.name: Feature Row
layouts.structure: Product 45% top → 4 feature icons/callouts row below → Detail labels
